response.overview: It’s finally here! Welcome to the ‘Charmed’ world premiere! We’ve cooked up something really special with this new Pervz series. A world of control and obedience. When these women hear their “magic word,” they go absolutely crazy! They want to be used and give complete control over to their new master. Drooling, eyes rolling into the back of their head. They’re completely smitten and give in to their sexual urges. In this premiere episode, Sophia is a focused, ready-to-succeed news anchor. But Quinton has different plans for her. He knows her weakness, and every time he says the word “captivate,” she gets hornier and hornier. Soon, she wants to be entirely owned and used by him. She becomes his plaything to do with as he pleases. What a lucky man Quinton is! Sophia looks amazing as she gets fucked from behind, truly embodying the role of a living sex doll. Charmed is set to be your new favorite series. Whose “magic word” do you want to learn next?
response.tagline: “Ready To ‘Captivate’ the World?” Sophia Gives Him Full Control
response.title: Charmed - Sophia Locke
